name: Pistmon
description: A Plant Digimon that evolved via a training program used by road racers . Its bicycle-like wheels and body are fully integrated with each other, and it has a remarkable sense of balance that allows it to stand still even when it is not running. Its thorny vines, which act as tires, are capable of changing shape, allowing it to run across even rough roads speedily without going flat. Its Special Moves are shooting thorns from its handle ( Bramble Shot ), and expelling highly toxic spores from the protrusions on its back ( Crimson Spores ). In addition, it mows down enemies in one go with its enlarged wheels ( Killing Cadence ).
